info.value: W: Good morning, Ben!</br>M: Good morning, Susan. Where did you go during your summer holiday?</br>W: I went to Beijing and I had a wonderful time there.</br>M: Did you visit the Great Wall?</br>W: Yes, it's very beautiful. Here is a picture of it.</br>M: Oh, it's even more wonderful than I thought. What other places did you visit?</br>W: Tian'anmen Square and the Palace Museum.</br>M: Sounds great. I hope I can visit these places one day.

question.ask: 5. Where did Susan go during her summer holiday?</br>(Shanghai. / Beijing. / Wuhan.)

std.value: She went to Beijing during her summer holiday.
